cast.name: Jim Nieciecki
cast.character: Union Station Bus Traveler Flash Back Sequence and Modern day scene

plot outline: A young woman grows up to be a stone-cold assassin after witnessing her parents' murder as a child in Bogota. She works for her uncle as a hitman by day, but her personal time is spent engaging in vigilante murders that she hopes will lead her to her ultimate target - the mobster responsible for her parents' death.
title: Colombiana

distributors.name: Walt Disney Studios Motion Pictures Germany

other companies.name: International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees (IATSE)
